traits.name: Acoustic Arcanist
traits.description: Your magic flows through melody and vibration.
traits.bonus: After playing an instrument at an inn, your sonic spells become 20% more powerful. However, your booming presence makes hiring followers more expensive, and your reliance on sound magic weakens your physical attacks by 15%.
bonusDetails: Your sonic spells become 20% more powerful.
Your reliance on sound magic weakens your physical attacks by 15%.

traits.name: Addict
traits.description: Addict: You've developed some bad habits.
traits.bonus: Skooma and alcohol benefits last 2x as long and you can craft skooma at cooking pot. When not under the effects of alcohol or skooma, you have a 25% chance to get staggered when hit.
bonusDetails: Skooma and alcohol benefits last 2x as long and you can craft skooma at cooking pot.
When not under the effects of alcohol or skooma, you have a 25% chance to get staggered when hit.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description: You possess a natural flight response.
traits.bonus: When at less than 50% health, you move 20% faster and regenerate 1 stamina per second but also deal 30% less damage when below this threshold.
bonusDetails: When at less than 50% health, you move 20% faster and regenerate 1 stamina per second but also deal 30% less damage when below this threshold.

traits.name: Angler
traits.description: Your bond with the sea grants unique benefits.
traits.bonus: Mudcrabs and slaughterfish become friendly toward you. Fishing yields more valuable items. Fishing rods deal double damage, can be tempered and have a chance to summon a mudcrab to fight at your side. The summoned mudcrab becomes stronger if you're carrying an insect or small fish. Fishing rods can be enchanted. However, your affinity with the waters leaves you 10% more vulnerable to shock damage.
bonusDetails: Mudcrabs and slaughterfish become friendly toward you.
Fishing rods deal double damage.
Can be tempered and have a chance to summon a mudcrab to fight at your side.
The summoned mudcrab becomes stronger if you're carrying an insect or small fish.
Fishing rods can be enchanted.

traits.name: Au Naturel
traits.description: Embrace your divine gifts!
traits.bonus: Start with +100 health, magicka, and stamina. For each piece of armor or clothing you wear, you lose 40 from each attribute (up to a maximum loss of -160 with four pieces equipped). Additionally, you gain +1 to health, magicka, and stamina per level for each empty armor slot (head, chest, hands, and feet).
bonusDetails: For each piece of armor or clothing you wear.
You lose 40 from each attribute (up to a maximum loss of -160 with four pieces equipped).
You gain +1 to health, magicka, and stamina per level for each empty armor slot (head, chest, hands, and feet).

traits.name: Bad Natured
traits.description: You were born into wickedness.
traits.bonus: Your attacks while being crouched deals 20% more and you're better at pickpocketing. However, attacks while standing up do 20% less and wearing a divine amulet will hurt you.
bonusDetails: Your attacks while being crouched deals 20% more and you're better at pickpocketing.
Attacks while standing up do 20% less and wearing a divine amulet will hurt you.

traits.name: Balanced Casting
traits.bonus: Pick a resistance (fire, frost, shock, poison or magic). Both you and enemies within 200 feet have this resistance reduced by 25%.
bonusDetails: Both you and enemies within 200 feet have this resistance reduced by 25%.

traits.name: Bane of the Wicked
traits.description: You are an enemy to all things abhorrent.
traits.bonus: Deal 20% more damage to undead, daedra and werewolves. However, do 10% less damage to other beings.
bonusDetails: Deal 20% more damage to undead.
Daedra and werewolves.
Do 10% less damage to other beings.

traits.name: Big Swing
traits.bonus: Power attacks are 20% stronger, but light attacks are 25% weaker.
bonusDetails: Power attacks are 20% stronger.
Light attacks are 25% weaker.

traits.name: Blighted Fists
traits.description: Your afflictions fuel your fury!
traits.bonus: Your unarmed attacks deal +10 unresistable disease damage per disease, and the effect of diseases on you is reduced by 50%. Your disease resistance is reduced by 200%.
bonusDetails: Your unarmed attacks deal +10 unresistable disease damage per disease.
The effect of diseases on you is reduced by 50%.

traits.name: Blood Mage
traits.description: You tap into your own life essence to empower your blood magic, increasing its potency, but leaving you more fragile.
traits.bonus: Blood and Absorb spells are 20% stronger, but your health is reduced by 2 * your level.
bonusDetails: Your health is reduced by 2 * your level.

traits.name: Blood Warrior
traits.bonus: You take 50% more physical damage and have 100% weakness to Poison. However you start with +50 health and gain +5 health per level.
bonusDetails: You start with +50 health and gain +5 health per level.

traits.name: Bulwark
traits.bonus: When standing still, you gain 200 armor rating and reflect 10% physical damage. You drain 1 additional stamina per second while sprinting and 0.25 when running.
bonusDetails: When standing still, you gain 200 armor rating and reflect 10% physical damage.
You drain 1 additional stamina per second while sprinting and 0.25 when running.

traits.name: Defiler
traits.description: The only use you have for the living is to resurrect them in death.
traits.bonus: Deal 20% more damage to playable races. However, do 10% less damage to other beings.
bonusDetails: Deal 20% more damage to playable races.
Do 10% less damage to other beings.

traits.name: Disbeliever
traits.description: You reject the influence of gods, placing your faith in logic and reason instead.
traits.bonus: Dwemer armor has 40% higher armor rating and Dwemer weapons are 40% stronger, but you cannot receive blessings.
bonusDetails: Dwemer armor has 40% higher armor rating and Dwemer weapons are 40% stronger.
You cannot receive blessings.

traits.name: Disciplined
traits.description: Shoot to kill.
traits.bonus: Bows and crossbows deal 20% more damage. However, they draw/reload 40% slower.

traits.name: Dominating Will
traits.description: Your presence commands fear.
traits.bonus: intimidation checks almost always succeed, and frenzy spells are 20% stronger. However, your persuasive charm is lacking, making persuasion checks harder, and your pacifying spells are 20% weaker.

traits.name: Dovah Tinvaak
traits.bonus: You are fluent in Dragon speech and as such can shout 20% more often, at 30% reduced effectiveness.

traits.name: Druid
traits.bonus: Druids are attuned to nature, making spriggans friendly and increasing power of druidic spells by 30%. You can craft Lifebloom Essence from Taproot and Spriggan Sap for powerful regeneration. However, your bond with the wild leaves you 25% more vulnerable to fire and axes.
bonusDetails: Making spriggans friendly and increasing power of druidic spells by 30%.
You can craft Lifebloom Essence from Taproot and Spriggan Sap for powerful regeneration.
Your bond with the wild leaves you 25% more vulnerable to fire and axes.

traits.name: Drunken Mage
traits.bonus: You regenerate no magicka while sober. When you drink alcohol, your Stamina and Magicka regeneration is increased by 100% and your next casted spell is 30% stronger.
bonusDetails: You regenerate no magicka while sober.
When you drink alcohol, your Stamina and Magicka regeneration is increased by 100% and your next casted spell is 30% stronger.

traits.name: Elemental Conduit
traits.description: Fire spells are more powerful in sunny weather but lose potency in the rain.
traits.bonus: Shock spells are enhanced during rain but are less effective in snowy conditions. Frost spells excel in snowy weather but weaken under sunny skies.
bonusDetails: Shock spells are enhanced during rain but are less effective in snowy conditions.
Frost spells excel in snowy weather but weaken under sunny skies.

traits.name: Fast Shot
traits.description: You'd rather shoot fast than shoot hard.
traits.bonus: Bows draw 40% faster, crossbows reload 40% faster. However, bows and crossbows deal 30% less damage.

traits.name: Fatal Attraction
traits.description: Your presence is as dangerous as it is alluring.
traits.bonus: You can choose one gender, you deal 20% more physical damage to the selected gender, but in turn, take 20% more from the other.
bonusDetails: You deal 20% more physical damage to the selected gender.
Take 20% more from the other.

traits.name: Fencer
traits.bonus: Light melee attacks are 30% stronger, but power attacks are 25% weaker.
bonusDetails: Light melee attacks are 30% stronger.
Power attacks are 25% weaker.

traits.name: Focused
traits.bonus: When in danger, you think before acting. When at less than 50% health, you regenerate 5 magicka per second and absorb 10% of incoming spells. However, you take 10% more damage when below this threshold.
bonusDetails: When in danger, you think before acting.
When at less than 50% health, you regenerate 5 magicka per second and absorb 10% of incoming spells.
You take 10% more damage when below this threshold.

traits.name: Focused Combat
traits.bonus: Pick onehanded, Twohanded or Marksman. Deal 10% more & take 10% less damage with this weapon type. However, you deal 10% less and take 10% more damage with the other two.
bonusDetails: Deal 10% more & take 10% less damage with this weapon type.
You deal 10% less and take 10% more damage with the other two.

traits.name: Focused Magic
traits.bonus: Pick one school of magic, spells from that school are 25% stronger or last 25% longer but cost 10% more. However, the remaining 4 schools are 50% weaker.
bonusDetails: Spells from that school are 25% stronger or last 25% longer but cost 10% more.
The remaining 4 schools are 50% weaker.

traits.name: Focused Precision
traits.description: Your reliance on careful aim comes at a cost.
traits.bonus: Arrows and bolts deal 15% less damage, but have a 20% chance to push targets away. The strength of this pushback scales with your Marksman skill.
bonusDetails: Arrows and bolts deal 15% less damage.
Have a 20% chance to push targets away.

traits.name: Gambler
traits.description: You go in all or nothing.
traits.bonus: Gain 30% chance to critical hit. However, overall weapon damage is reduced by 40%. When you land a critical hit, your attacks do 10% more damage for 30 seconds (stackable up to 5 times).
bonusDetails: When you land a critical hit, your attacks do 10% more damage for 30 seconds (stackable up to 5 times).

traits.name: Giantkin
traits.description: Descended from the mighty giants.
traits.bonus: you gain 10% magic resistance and damage with blunt weapons, however you cannot read skill books, or use scrolls and staves.
bonusDetails: You cannot read skill books.
Or use scrolls and staves.

traits.name: Glutton
traits.description: You LOVE food but hate medicine.
traits.bonus: Food benefits are 25% stronger but potions have only 50% their efficiency.

traits.name: Good Natured
traits.description: You have a good heart.
traits.bonus: Deal 20% less damage with weapons and Destruction spells. However, while wearing an amulet of the divines beneficial spells and potions last 20% longer and you take 20% less damage.
bonusDetails: While wearing an amulet of the divines beneficial spells and potions last 20% longer and you take 20% less damage.

traits.name: Heir to the Relic
traits.description: You begin your journey with a treasured artifact passed down through your bloodline. But such gifts are never free; the legacy carries a hidden debt. Until it is repaid, you are bound to the land, unable to fast travel.

traits.name: Hoarder
traits.description: You love carrying stuff around, even if it's junk.
traits.bonus: Gain +200 carryweight. Selling prices are 50% worse.

traits.name: Introvert
traits.description: You thrive in solitude but falter in the crowd.
traits.bonus: When facing three or fewer enemies, you deal 15% more damage, whether with weapons or Destruction magic. Against four or more, your nerves get the better of you, and you deal 10% less.
bonusDetails: When facing three or fewer enemies, you deal 15% more damage, whether with weapons or Destruction magic.
Against four or more.
You deal 10% less.

traits.name: Iron Knees
traits.bonus: You take 50% less damage from enemy arrows and bolts. Getting hit with an arrow restores 20 stamina. However, you move 15% slower.
bonusDetails: You take 50% less damage from enemy arrows and bolts.

traits.name: Jack of All Spells
traits.description: But master of none.
traits.bonus: Novice, Apprentice and Adept spells are 20% stronger or longer lasting, expert and master spells are 20% weaker or shorter.
bonusDetails: Apprentice and Adept spells are 20% stronger or longer lasting.
Expert and master spells are 20% weaker or shorter.

traits.name: King of Worms
traits.description: You've gained hidden insight into necromantic arts.
traits.bonus: You can have 1 additional summon or undead thrall. However, the duration of summon and resurrecting spells is reduced by 33%.
bonusDetails: You can have 1 additional summon or undead thrall.
The duration of summon and resurrecting spells is reduced by 33%.

traits.name: Light Foot
traits.description: You've never felt comfortable in footwear.
traits.bonus: When not wearing boots/shoes, your movement is muffled, you move 10% faster and suffer no fall damage. When wearing boots/shoes you move 10% slower.
bonusDetails: When not wearing boots/shoes, your movement is muffled, you move 10% faster and suffer no fall damage.
When wearing boots/shoes you move 10% slower.

traits.name: Lurker
traits.bonus: When not wearing any clothes or armor sneak attacks deal 2.5 times more damage and can sneak 25% better, and are 100% immune to disease. Eating fish when it's raw and wriggling triggers a powerful effect that lasts 10 minutes. However, armor provides no protection, cooked food offers no benefits, and weapons with a weight above 10 will deal no damage.
bonusDetails: When not wearing any clothes or armor sneak attacks deal 2.5 times more damage and can sneak 25% better, and are 100% immune to disease.
Eating fish when it's raw and wriggling triggers a powerful effect that lasts 10 minutes.
Weapons with a weight above 10 will deal no damage.

traits.name: Marathon Runner
traits.bonus: You regenerate 5 stamina and 1 health per second while sprinting. However, you will not be able to gain any stamina while running or standing still.
bonusDetails: You regenerate 5 stamina and 1 health per second while sprinting.
You will not be able to gain any stamina while running or standing still.

traits.name: Master of Destiny
traits.description: You reject the influence of fate and star signs.
traits.bonus: Your birthsigns bonuses are removed, but you begin the game with 5 additional perk points and a permanent +5 boost to all skills.
bonusDetails: Your birthsigns bonuses are removed.
You begin the game with 5 additional perk points and a permanent +5 boost to all skills.

traits.name: Monk
traits.bonus: Power attacks with quarterstaves will force the enemy to drop their weapon to the ground, however this only applies if you're not wearing any armor (light or heavy). You also recieve a unique battlestaff.
bonusDetails: Power attacks with quarterstaves will force the enemy to drop their weapon to the ground.
This only applies if you're not wearing any armor (light or heavy).

traits.name: Nosferatu
traits.description: You're an ugly sight and live in the sewers.
traits.bonus: -50 speech, no health, magicka or stamina regen outdoors. Eating skeever meat gives you a 20% speed boost and restores 10 health, magicka and stamina per second for 180 seconds.
bonusDetails: No health, magicka or stamina regen outdoors.
Eating skeever meat gives you a 20% speed boost and restores 10 health, magicka and stamina per second for 180 seconds.

traits.name: Old Fashioned
traits.description: If it ain't broke, don't fix it.
traits.bonus: Weapons, armor and magical staves made of iron, wood, steel, forsworn, scaled, leather fur or hide are 15% stronger. Otherwise, they are 10% weaker.
bonusDetails: Armor and magical staves made of iron.
Leather fur or hide are 15% stronger.
They are 10% weaker.

traits.name: Pacifist
traits.bonus: When your arms are lowered you restore 2 magicka and stamina per second. However, raising your hands in combat will have the opposite effect. Those born under the sign of the Atronach only restore 1 but still drain 2.
bonusDetails: When your arms are lowered you restore 2 magicka and stamina per second. Raising your hands in combat will have the opposite effect.
Those born under the sign of the Atronach only restore 1 but still drain 2.

traits.name: Phalanx
traits.bonus: You deal 15% more damage with spears, javelins, pikes, and halberds. However, you take 50% more damage when hit from behind. Also gives you a unique pike.
bonusDetails: You deal 15% more damage with spears, javelins, pikes, and halberds.
You take 50% more damage when hit from behind.

traits.name: Plagued Mind
traits.bonus: Your undead summons and raised dead last 200% longer. However, your magicka is reduced to 0 while a friendly summon is active.
bonusDetails: Your undead summons and raised dead last 200% longer.
Your magicka is reduced to 0 while a friendly summon is active.

traits.name: Quester
traits.bonus: Start with 50 less Health, Magicka and Stamina. Gain 2 of each per 1 quest completed, up to a maximum of +200 at 300 quests completed.
bonusDetails: Gain 2 of each per 1 quest completed.
Up to a maximum of +200 at 300 quests completed.

traits.name: Rage
traits.description: You posses a natural fight response.
traits.bonus: When at less than 50% health, you deal 10% more damage and take 10% less damage. However, you move 30% slower when below this threshold.
bonusDetails: When at less than 50% health, you deal 10% more damage and take 10% less damage.
You move 30% slower when below this threshold.

traits.name: Self-Taught
traits.bonus: For every 5 book or notes read, gain 1 point of Magicka, for up to 300 Magicka at 1500 read. However, you start with 100 less Magicka.
bonusDetails: For every 5 book or notes read.
For up to 300 Magicka at 1500 read.

traits.name: Serene Presence
traits.description: Your calming aura makes you effortlessly persuasive.
traits.bonus: persuasion checks almost always succeed, and pacifying spells are 20% stronger. However, your intimidation attempts are half as likely to succeed, and your frenzy spells are 20% weaker.

traits.name: Shehai
traits.bonus: Your bound weapons do 15% more damage. But you take 25% more damage from the undead.
bonusDetails: Your bound weapons do 15% more damage.
You take 25% more damage from the undead.

traits.name: Silent Dovah
traits.description: You choose not to speak the Thu'um, instead hoarding the souls of slain dragons to fuel your own power.
traits.bonus: For every 1 unspent dragon souls, you gain +5 Health, Magicka, and Stamina. However, this draconic strength rejects the curse of beast or blood: werewolves and vampires cannot harness its power. Your persuasion and intimidation attempts almost never succeed.
bonusDetails: For every 1 unspent dragon souls.
This draconic strength rejects the curse of beast or blood: werewolves and vampires cannot harness its power.

traits.name: Skilled
traits.bonus: Reading skill books grants an extra skill point and trainers cost 50% less, however every 5 levels you don't gain a perk point.
bonusDetails: Every 5 levels you don't gain a perk point.

traits.name: Soul Embed
traits.bonus: At will, you can consume a dragon soul to amplify the magnitude of your shouts by 50% for 1 hour.
bonusDetails: You can consume a dragon soul to amplify the magnitude of your shouts by 50% for 1 hour.

traits.name: Soul Reaver
traits.description: You've claimed countless souls for your gain.
traits.bonus: Weapon and armor enchantments are 15% stronger and use 15% less charge. Armor rating and weapon damage is reduced by 20%.
bonusDetails: Weapon and armor enchantments are 15% stronger and use 15% less charge.

traits.name: Sunkissed
traits.description: You draw strength from the sun's radiant blaze.
traits.bonus: sun spells are 15% more powerful in your hands. But such warmth comes at a cost: you take 25% more frost damage, and this weakness deepens to 50% beneath the cold veil of night.
bonusDetails: Such warmth comes at a cost: you take 25% more frost damage.
This weakness deepens to 50% beneath the cold veil of night.

traits.name: Swimmer
traits.description: You prefer life on the water.
traits.bonus: You swim 10% faster, can breath underwater and regenerate health, stamina and magicka by a flat 1 per second when wet. On land when dry, you suffer 50% less health, stamina and magicka regeneration.
bonusDetails: Can breath underwater and regenerate health, stamina and magicka by a flat 1 per second when wet.
On land when dry.
You suffer 50% less health, stamina and magicka regeneration.

traits.name: The True Apprentice
traits.bonus: All spells cost 60% less but are 40% weaker or last 40% shorter.

traits.name: Touch of the Arcane
traits.bonus: Your touch and cloak spells are 20% stronger. All other spell types are 10% weaker or last 10% less.
bonusDetails: All other spell types are 10% weaker or last 10% less.

traits.name: Unbound Hands
traits.description: Handwear constricts you.
traits.bonus: Spells are 15% stronger and unarmed attacks do +30 more damage when not wearing gloves/gauntlets. However, they suffer the opposite effect when wearing gloves/gauntlets.
bonusDetails: Spells are 15% stronger and unarmed attacks do +30 more damage when not wearing gloves/gauntlets. They suffer the opposite effect when wearing gloves/gauntlets.

traits.name: Unshakable
traits.description: You turn defense into offense.
traits.bonus: Your shield bashes deal 50% more damage and cost 20% less Stamina. However, your unwavering focus on your shield makes you move 20% slower when not blocking.
bonusDetails: Your shield bashes deal 50% more damage and cost 20% less Stamina.
Your unwavering focus on your shield makes you move 20% slower when not blocking.

traits.name: Wanderer
traits.bonus: Start with 50 less stamina and -50% stamina regeneration rate. Gain 1 stamina and 1% stamina regeneration for every 2 locations discovered, up to a maximum of +200 stamina and +200% regeneration at 400 locations.
bonusDetails: Gain 1 stamina and 1% stamina regeneration for every 2 locations discovered.
Up to a maximum of +200 stamina and +200% regeneration at 400 locations.

traits.name: Way of the Voice
traits.bonus: You follow the pacifist creed of the Greybeards, and as such your hostile shouts are 30% less effective, but using non-hostile shouts has a 20% chance reset the shout cooldown.
bonusDetails: As such your hostile shouts are 30% less effective.
Using non-hostile shouts has a 20% chance reset the shout cooldown.

traits.name: Witcher
traits.bonus: Potions and ingredients you consume are 25% stronger and logner lasting. However, you can only benefit from up to four active potion effects at a time.
bonusDetails: Potions and ingredients you consume are 25% stronger and logner lasting.
You can only benefit from up to four active potion effects at a time.

traits.name: Wizard's Wardrobe
traits.bonus: Your wands are 30% more effective when wearing a wizard hat. When not wearing a wizard hat, all spells are 10% less powerful or last 10% less.
bonusDetails: Your wands are 30% more effective when wearing a wizard hat.
When not wearing a wizard hat, all spells are 10% less powerful or last 10% less.
